title: stylocoryna nilagirica
intro: Stylocoryna nilagirica is a rare, endangered plant species found in the Western Ghats of India, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indian medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Stylocoryna nilagirica include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential in treating various diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are used to make infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are used to treat different ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
